title: Evas Roar
wikitext:
[]: Eva's Roar.....             Quote Post by Lujerker » Tue Oct 24, 2006 2:33 pm [quote="Six Winged Angel "]I think that Eva 00 roars when it throws the lance

[]: Re: Eva's Roar.....             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Oct 24, 2006 3:50 pm I think the roars are simply there to emphasise the "beastial" nature and violent rage that exist in the Evas. They are supposed to be "demons" of frightning power after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Oct 24, 2006 4:49 pm i agree 100%

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Tue Oct 24, 2006 6:26 pm The lance roared! Since they only roar when berserk, or "awoken" (Nigouki,) I think it does sort of emphasize their beastial nature.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Tue Oct 24, 2006 9:11 pm The eva's are biological, and when animals get pissed, they sometimes have a tendancy to roar.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Oct 24, 2006 9:29 pm Nukie wrote: The lance roared! Since they only roar when berserk, or "awoken" (Nigouki,) I think it does sort of emphasize their beastial nature.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 24, 2006 9:43 pm slothen wrote: maybe i should watch it again, but i always thought of it more as a "swoooosh" noise.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Wed Oct 25, 2006 12:16 am Yeah as I can remember only in DC it roars but I'm not sure. Well, I agree that the roar is (but not limited to) some kind of anger expression, anger which could be derived from a thousand reasons now for Unit 00, usually in the olimpics I see the athletes giving a large "roar" when they throw the lance. Eva-01s roar is so magnificent.., it sounds like it's screaming as loud as it is able, but still could roar loudly if it wasn't restrained. stunning

[]: Re: Eva's Roar.....             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 25, 2006 7:49 am Lujerker wrote: Talking 'bout that... the roars of the evas have some meaning ???

[]: Re: Eva's Roar.....             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Oct 25, 2006 10:16 am Reichu wrote: They're distorted human hollers.

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Wed Oct 25, 2006 3:59 pm Why the rolling eyes?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 25, 2006 4:07 pm ok, the Roars have no sagnificant meaning they just put them in to express the Beastial nature of Eva. cuz y have biological robots that dont make a peep?

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Wed Oct 25, 2006 4:20 pm ok, the Roars have no sagnificant meaning

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Wed Oct 25, 2006 5:02 pm Lujerker wrote: ok, the Roars have no sagnificant meaning

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 25, 2006 5:19 pm It's also a pun on the title of a Harlan Ellison story (which is a very Anno-ish thing to do).

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 25, 2006 6:58 pm Someone smarter than me wrote: The Beast that Shouted "I/Ai" at the Heart of the World Even though "ai" means love, I always thought it made more sense for it to be "I", implying Shinji's nature of daring to be an individual in within the complemented state.

[]: Re: Eva's Roar.....             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Oct 25, 2006 7:18 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: Talking 'bout that... the roars of the evas have some meaning ??? Remember.... when the Eva01 gets berseck 'n begin to scream immediately Zeruel attack with his (or her :roll: ) arm ......

[]: Re: Eva's Roar.....             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 25, 2006 8:45 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: In that case it's a very, very pissed off mother showing her displeasure with the bully trying to kill her son and species. Pretty much the same with Sachiel and Leliel. In EOE she was trying to look and sound badass.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 25, 2006 9:15 pm Damn it! You people are good! It's a good thing I joined this forums!

[]: Re: Eva's Roar.....             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Oct 25, 2006 10:52 pm Reichu wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: In that case it's a very, very pissed off mother showing her displeasure with the bully trying to kill her son and species. Pretty much the same with Sachiel and Leliel. In EOE she was trying to look and sound badass.
